title: Man-in-the-Middle Tampers with API Responses
description: Traffic between client and server traverses an untrusted network. An adversary in a privileged network position modifies API responses in transit to alter application behaviour.
mitigation: Enforce TLS 1.2+ on all endpoints. Implement HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) with preloading. Pin certificates in mobile clients. Validate response integrity using message signatures.
